query: SELECT l.id, l.title, l.fileUrl, c.title as courseTitle FROM lessons l JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id WHERE c.title LIKE '%Connection Rates%' ORDER BY l.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2BUx4aB33MgfJQi.28261bf45373 --database gkLpfNMVYQYMxzYT6m74Yk --execute SELECT l.id, l.title, l.fileUrl, c.title as courseTitle FROM lessons l JOIN courses c ON l.courseId = c.id WHERE c.title LIKE '%Connection Rates%' ORDER BY l.sortOrder;
